reasoning: The 2025 Dutch general election saw D66 and PVV emerge as the largest parties. As of late January 2026, credible reports confirm that a minority coalition consisting of D66, CDA, and VVD has been agreed upon, with Rob Jetten (D66) set to become the Prime Minister. GroenLinks-PvdA (GL/PvdA) is not part of this coalition. Furthermore, the Polymarket price for this specific market option was at 0.00 in late January. The only way this resolves to YES is if the finalized D66-CDA-VVD agreement collapses before being officially sworn in by the monarch, AND a completely new formation process surprisingly elevates GL/PvdA to lead a government that strictly resolves to their market option. Such a sequence of events is highly improbable, warranting a minimum probability estimate.
